marketState: neutral-to-bearish — price sits at fair value but storage surplus, weak seasonality odds, and bearish higher-timeframe technicals tilt risk lower
summary: Front-month NG (2.94) is trading almost exactly at model fair value ($2.917, band $2.42-$3.42), so there is no immediate mispricing to exploit. Seasonality is a headwind: price is running -10.3pp below its typical seasonal path, and 16-year history shows only a 31% chance of being higher in 4 weeks with a typical -3.1% move, though a 50pp confidence spread means this signal is flagged Low reliability. Storage sits +184 Bcf above the 5-year average (a bearish supply overhang into the shoulder season) while managed money is only moderately net short (35th percentile, ratio 0.8), leaving room to add shorts. Current cooling demand is running +7% above its 5-year normal but has fallen -11.9 in 24h and sits mid-range of its own 7-day band; the 1-7D/8-16D weather demand percentile and range data needed to judge near-term demand momentum is missing from this snapshot. Technicals are split by horizon: 5m/15m show short-term overbought momentum (RSI 66, price above upper Bollinger) while 1h/4h/1d/1w all show a bearish trend with negative MACD on 4h/1d, consistent with a corrective bounce inside a broader downtrend.

longTerm.entry: $2.95 – $3.05 (scale in on a bounce toward/above fair value)
longTerm.rationale: Seasonality favors downside (only 31% odds of a higher price in 4 weeks, typical 4-week move -3.1%) while storage sits +184 Bcf above the 5-year average, a bearish supply overhang. longTerm.invalidation: Sustained close above $3.15, a swing to a storage deficit vs the 5-year average, or a colder-than-normal 8-16D outlook that reverses the current demand fade.

shortTerm.rationale: Front price is essentially at fair value (spread +$0.023, status FAIR) with no valuation edge, and short-term technicals conflict — 5m/15m are overbought (RSI 66, above upper Bollinger) while 1h is already bearish (RSI 38), suggesting a fading bounce inside the larger downtrend. Critically, the 1-7D and 8-16D weather demand percentile/range data needed to gauge near-term heat-driven demand is missing from this snapshot, so a directional near-term call is not well supported.
shortTerm.trigger: Wait for 1-7D/8-16D weather demand data to populate, or for price to tag $3.05-$3.10 with a 1h/4h RSI rollover (favors short) or pull back to $2.75-$2.80 with a bullish reversal (favors long) before entering with confirmation.
